rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF VERLIS BROWN SMITH
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Require Rodney Smith To Submit To A Dna Test Concerning The Issues Of Standing And Paternity Issues Of Verlis Brown Smith And Rodney Smith
rulings.Rulings: Motion to Require Rodney Smith to Submit to a DNA Test is DENIED. DNA testing cannot be ordered to determine intestate succession. Estate of Sanders (1992) 2 Cal.App.4th 462 and In re Estate of Burden (2007) 146 Cal.App.4th 1021, 1030-1311. Moving parties lack standing under Family Code 7611(a) and 7630(a)(2). The Presumptions under Family Code 7611(d) have not been rebutted. Judicial estoppel bars moving parties. Any party who contests the tentative and wishes to argue the matter must notify the court (415-551-3702) and opposing counsel no later than 4:00 p.m. on February 13, 2013.
